name: PRECC Token Saver
description: Predictive Error Correction for agentic AI — fixes bash commands before they fail, compresses CLI output, and saves 34%+ of API token spend.

preccBin.description: Absolute path to the precc binary. Defaults to 'precc' on PATH.

preccHookBin.description: Absolute path to precc-hook binary. Defaults to 'precc-hook' on PATH.

autoInit.description: Automatically run 'precc init' on first use if databases are absent.

reportOnSummary.description: Append a token-savings summary line after each agent session.
